solution_criteria: Handles input without errors or timeouts
Maintains output quality and coherence despite input complexity
scenario: Testing with extremely long or complex input strings to assess performance and output quality under stress conditions

solution_criteria: System handles empty/null inputs gracefully without crashing
Provides clear error message or default behavior when no input is provided
Returns a valid response structure even with missing data
scenario: Testing with empty or null input values to verify error handling and default behavior

solution_criteria: Correctly parses and preserves all special characters (!, @, #, $, %, ^, &, *)
Handles Unicode symbols properly (émojis: 🎯📊✨, mathematical: ∑∫√, currency: €¥₹)
Identifies and reports any characters that cannot be processed or decoded
scenario: Testing with special characters, unicode symbols, and formatting codes to ensure proper parsing and handling of edge cases
